question: I have an SCF idea and want a repeatable positioning brief against prior submissions, funding outcomes, and live competitors. What workflow should I use?

golden.answer: Use the SCF Submission Radar playbook. Search similar submissions by natural-language idea, inspect award_type separately from mere submission, profile linked projects and team history, expand from a close submission, reality-check live competitors, confirm the live category vocabulary, then synthesize a positioning brief. It researches and positions; it does not submit an application.
keyFacts: Searches prior SCF submissions and distinguishes funded outcomes from proposals that were not awarded.
Combines submission history, project profiles, live competitors, and category fit into a positioning brief.
avoid: Do NOT describe every prior submission as funded.
Do NOT claim the read-only workflow submits an SCF application.
golden.notes: Best-source case for the bundled SCF Submission Radar skill.

sources.note: Fetch-verified local path exists and defines the exercised contract/workflow.
